About K2 Intellect

Built by Finance Professionals, for CFA Candidates

K2 Intellect carries a long and distinguished pedigree of educating students across a wide range of professional and academic courses. Over the years, we have developed and refined proprietary teaching techniques that help students absorb, retain, and apply complex concepts with clarity and confidence — turning what can feel like daunting syllabi into structured, manageable learning journeys.

Our CFA Level I practice questions programme has been specially designed by CFA Charterholders who have devoted considerable time and expertise to curating the right questions — questions that go beyond rote recall and genuinely deepen a candidate's understanding of the subject. Every question reflects real exam-pattern thinking, grounded in the curriculum yet calibrated to build lasting conceptual mastery.

From formula-intensive chapters in Quantitative Methods and Fixed Income to conceptual areas like Ethics and Portfolio Management, our question bank mirrors the actual difficulty distribution of the CFA exam across all three difficulty tiers — designed for candidates worldwide who are serious about passing on their first attempt.

Curriculum Coverage

Complete CFA Level I Topic Coverage

📐
Quantitative Methods
Time value of money, probability, statistics, and regression analysis.
Formula Focus
🌐
Economics
Microeconomics, macroeconomics, monetary and fiscal policy.
📊
Financial Statement Analysis
Income statements, balance sheets, cash flows and financial ratios.
Formula Focus
🏢
Corporate Issuers
Capital structure, working capital, governance and stakeholders.
📈
Equity Investments
Equity markets, valuation models, and company analysis.
💵
Fixed Income
Bond features, yield measures, duration, convexity, and credit risk.
Formula Focus
🔄
Derivatives
Forwards, futures, swaps, and options pricing and valuation.
Formula Focus
🏛️
Alternative Investments
Real estate, hedge funds, private equity, and digital assets.
🎯
Portfolio Management
Portfolio theory, risk-return tradeoffs, and behavioural finance.
Formula Focus
⚖️
Ethical & Professional Standards
CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct.
What Makes Us Different

One-of-a-Kind Features for Serious Candidates

🧮
Formula Mastery Engine
Questions are structured across 6 pedagogy levels (V1–V6), taking you from basic recall to complex multi-step applications of every key formula.
📚
10,000+ Practice Questions
The largest India-focused CFA Level I question bank, covering all 10 topic areas with balanced answer distributions.
🎚️
Difficulty-Adaptive Practice
Every question is tagged Easy, Moderate, or Difficult. Filter your practice sessions to drill the level that challenges you most.
⏱️
Chapter-Level Challenge Mode
Launch timed practice sessions by chapter, by topic, or across the full curriculum — with shuffled questions every time.
📉
Performance Dashboard
Track your scores, identify weak chapters, and get a plain-language summary of exactly where to focus your next study session.
🤖
AI Doubt Solver
Stuck on a concept? Ask the built-in AI Doubt Solver for a step-by-step explanation, any time, within the platform.

Study Tips

  • CFA questions often hinge on "most likely" or "least likely" — read carefully.
  • Mark tricky questions to revisit them before finishing.
  • After submitting, review every explanation — not just wrong answers.
  • Use the difficulty badges to spot your weak areas in the results screen.
